sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n58921" key="konta/rion1" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κοντάριον</orth> (A), <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n58921.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">κέντρον</ref> </xr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg9020.tlg001:9" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2043.tlg001:2:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.Astr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.11</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
